title: Ensure test container in running state
body:
* Save storage if tests fail

Fixes #1643

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

LGTM assuming happy tests, but looks like F28 Cloud is kicking up its heals.

@jwhonce Ugg, sorry I'm too slow.  Didn't get a chance to take a look at this.  Does this mean we can simply ignore the cgroup/mount race until a customer stumbles into it (somehow)?

After three days working on it...I'm not able to come up with a reliable repdocuer (so either it's accidentally fixed, or just too time-consuming to continue to track down).
@cevich I'm still trying to track down the cgroup issue.  This change covered the status race between podman and runc.
@jwhonce kk, thx.  Let me know if I can help.
